name: King Aurelion Veyrath IX
title: King of Atlantis and the Deep Realm
description: The beloved ruler of Atlantis. Calm, intelligent, and deeply respected by nearly every citizen of the Deep Realm.

appearance.hair: Long white hair braided with gold rings
appearance.armor: Royal ceremonial armor of blue coral, gold, and pearl

favoriteQuote: A kingdom is measured not by its walls, but by how safely its people sleep.
publicReputation: The greatest king Atlantis has known in generations.
dmSecret: Aurelion genuinely believes he is protecting Atlantis. Whether he knows the full truth behind the conspiracy is left intentionally uncertain.

name: Commander Vaeloria Stormcurrent
title: Commander of the Tidewardens
description: Supreme commander of the Tidewardens and one of the most respected military leaders in Atlantis.
favoriteQuote: Discipline saves lives long before courage ever has the chance.
dmSecret: She has begun noticing inconsistencies within official investigations but has not yet uncovered the truth.

name: Captain Thalorin Tideborn
title: Captain of the Tidewardens
description: Veteran officer responsible for training and leading new Tidewarden recruits.
favoriteQuote: Your rank means nothing if the people behind you don't trust you.
dmSecret: Thalorin has quietly begun questioning orders coming from higher authorities.

name: Sergeant Thalric Tideborn
title: Senior Academy Sergeant
description: The senior drill instructor responsible for preparing recruits for active service.
favoriteQuote: I'd rather bruise your pride today than bury you tomorrow.
dmSecret: Still carries guilt for losing a recruit squad years ago.

name: King Alaric Stormwake IV
title: Storm King of the Surface Realm
description: The ruler of the Surface Realm and symbolic leader of the Azure Sentinels.
favoriteQuote: The ocean separates kingdoms only until courage builds a bridge.
dmSecret: Publicly supports peace with Atlantis, though many of his advisors do not.
